Create Properties Our Property & Rental ERP Software allows you to create and manage multiple properties under each property type effortlessly. Whether you're managing a building with numerous apartme...

Tried & Tested Propety & Rental ERP Software to manage medium to large number of apartments, buildings, shops and more.

Create Properties Our Property & Rental ERP Software allows you to create and manage multiple properties under each property type effortlessly. Whether you're managing a building with numerous apartments or a gated compound with multiple villas, the software supports unlimited property types and quantities. You can easily specify whether a property is fully, semi, or unfurnished. For furnished properties, quickly add and manage inventory items to streamline your property setup. This comprehensive solution ensures efficient property management, making it simple to organize, categorize, and track all your real estate assets in one place.

Create Properties

Our Property & Rental ERP Software allows you to create and manage multiple properties under each property type effortlessly. Whether you're managing a building with numerous apartments or a gated compound with multiple villas, the software supports unlimited property types and quantities. You can easily specify whether a property is fully, semi, or unfurnished. For furnished properties, quickly add and manage inventory items to streamline your property setup. This comprehensive solution ensures efficient property management, making it simple to organize, categorize, and track all your real estate assets in one place.

Track Vacancies

Our Property & Rental ERP Software provides property owners with crucial insights into the status of their properties. You can easily track the number and location of currently vacant properties and generate reports on contracts approaching renewal in the coming months. This valuable data enables proactive management, such as discussing contract renewals with tenants in advance and preparing properties for rent with precise availability dates. By leveraging these insights, property owners can minimize vacancy periods and maximize rental income. The software's comprehensive reporting and tracking features ensure efficient property management and timely action.

Standard Contract Template

Our Property & Rental ERP Software simplifies contract management with customizable standard contract templates. These templates automatically retrieve and populate tenant and property owner information, ensuring accuracy and consistency across all contracts. By using system-generated data, the software ensures that all tenants receive standardized contracts with accurate details and terms. Additionally, the contract text can be printed in one or multiple languages, adhering to local legal requirements. This streamlines the contract creation process, reduces manual errors, and ensures compliance, making it easier for property managers to handle agreements efficiently.

Auto Rental Invoicing

Our Property & Rental ERP Software streamlines rent billing by accommodating various payment frequencies such as monthly, quarterly, semi-annually, or annually, based on the contract terms. The system automatically generates and emails invoices to tenants and records the transaction in the accounting module with automated ledger entries. Once the invoice is sent, the accounts officer can easily track and manage rent collections. Upon receiving payment, the system generates and emails a payment receipt to the tenant, ensuring a smooth and efficient billing process. This integration reduces administrative workload and enhances financial accuracy and communication.

Accounts Receivable

Our Property & Rental ERP Software automates rent invoicing, generating an accounts receivable entry to track all outstanding rental payments by tenants. The system allows accounts officers to send reminder emails for overdue invoices, including legally approved text in the email body to ensure compliance. When tenants make payments, the ERP software facilitates quick and easy issuance of payment receipts with just a few clicks. This seamless integration streamlines the billing and collection process, reduces manual effort, and enhances financial accuracy, making property management more efficient and organized.

Property & Rental ERP Software

is your all-in-one solution for managing a large portfolio of properties. Designed for residential, office spaces, shops, and more, this comprehensive system streamlines property management with features like automated invoicing and rental payment modules. Tenants receive payment receipts promptly, while property owners ensure timely rental collections without missing any payments. By centralizing these processes, our ERP software enhances operational efficiency and financial accuracy, making it an essential tool for managing both small and extensive property portfolios effectively.
